```{r technical-details}
  cat("- Total voxels 2.5cm:", total_voxel_count[1], "voxels\n")
  cat("- Total voxels 5cm:", total_voxel_count[2], "voxels\n")
  cat("- Total voxels 10cm:", total_voxel_count[3], "voxels\n")
  cat("- Total voxels 20cm:", total_voxel_count[4], "voxels\n")
  cat("- Wood density:", densite_bois, "kg/m³")
  cat("- Processing date:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n")
  
  # No longer used for now
  # cat("- Archi QSM cleaning threshold:", aRchi_QSM_clean_treshold, "\n")
}
```

```{r save-to-csv, include=FALSE}
# Calculate nearest neighbors to get the Fitting Ratios for tree comparisons between years
nn_dists <- dbscan::kNN(x = t0_comp[, 1:3], query = t1_comp[, 1:3], k = 1)$dist

tree_name <- gsub("\\.laz$", "", current_file_name)
report_name <- paste0("report_", tree_name, ".html")

safe <- function(x) if (length(x) == 0) NA else x

tree_summary <- data.frame(
  Bloc_Nb = safe(bloc_nb),
  Tree_ID = safe(tree_id),
  Tree_Type = safe(tree_type),
  Tree = safe(tree_name),
  Treatment = safe(tree_treatment),
  Height_m = safe(rounded_height),
  Total_pixel = nrow(XYZ),
  
  voxR_Biomass_kg = safe(voxR_biomass),
  Archi_Biomass_kg = safe(Rounded_Archi_Biomass),
  AdTree_Biomass_kg = safe(AdTree_Biomass),
  Trunk_Height_m = safe(trunk_height),
  Crown_Height_m = safe(crown_height),
  Crown_Diam_m = safe(voxR_crown_diam),
  Proj_Area_m2 = safe(voxR_proj_area),
  AdTree_Total_Tree_Length_m = safe(AdTree_Total_Tree_Length),
  AdTree_DBH_cm = safe(AdTree_DBH),
  ItsME_DBH_cm = safe(ItsME_DBH),
  voxR_DBH_cm = safe(voxR_DBH),
  
  Alignement_RSME = safe(alignment_rmse),
  
  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_6m_2_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[1, 1]),
  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_7m_2_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[1, 2]),
  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_8m_2_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[1, 3]),
  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_9m_2_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[1, 4]),
  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_10m_2_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[1, 5]),

  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_6m_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[2, 1]),
  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_7m_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[2, 2]),
  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_8m_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[2, 3]),
  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_9m_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[2, 4]),
  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_10m_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[2, 5]),

  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_6m_10cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[3, 1]),
  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_7m_10cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[3, 2]),
  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_8m_10cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[3, 3]),
  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_9m_10cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[3, 4]),
  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_10m_10cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[3, 5]),

  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_6m_20cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[4, 1]),
  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_7m_20cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[4, 2]),
  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_8m_20cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[4, 3]),
  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_9m_20cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[4, 4]),
  Nb_Voxel_3phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_10m_20cm = safe(nb_voxels_3phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[4, 5]),

  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_6m_2_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[1, 1]),
  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_7m_2_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[1, 2]),
  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_8m_2_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[1, 3]),
  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_9m_2_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[1, 4]),
  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_10m_2_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[1, 5]),

  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_6m_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[2, 1]),
  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_7m_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[2, 2]),
  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_8m_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[2, 3]),
  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_9m_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[2, 4]),
  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_10m_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[2, 5]),

  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_6m_10cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[3, 1]),
  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_7m_10cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[3, 2]),
  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_8m_10cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[3, 3]),
  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_9m_10cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[3, 4]),
  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_10m_10cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[3, 5]),
  
  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_6m_20cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[4, 1]),
  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_7m_20cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[4, 2]),
  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_8m_20cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[4, 3]),
  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_9m_20cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[4, 4]),
  Nb_Voxel_1phase__in_crit_pruning_zone_10m_20cm = safe(nb_voxels_1phase_in_crit_pruning_zone_at_height[4, 5]),

  
  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_6m_2_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[1, 1]),
  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_7m_2_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[1, 2]),
  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_8m_2_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[1, 3]),
  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_9m_2_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[1, 4]),
  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_10m_2_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[1, 5]),

  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_6m_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[2, 1]),
  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_7m_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[2, 2]),
  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_8m_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[2, 3]),
  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_9m_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[2, 4]),
  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_10m_5cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[2, 5]),

  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_6m_10cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[3, 1]),
  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_7m_10cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[3, 2]),
  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_8m_10cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[3, 3]),
  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_9m_10cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[3, 4]),
  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_10m_10cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[3, 5]),

  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_6m_20cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[4, 1]),
  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_7m_20cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[4, 2]),
  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_8m_20cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[4, 3]),
  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_9m_20cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[4, 4]),
  Nb_Voxel_in_cone_10m_20cm = safe(nb_voxels_in_cone_at_height[4, 5]),
  
  Spherical_nb_voxels_6m_2_5cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[1, 1]),
  Spherical_nb_voxels_7m_2_5cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[1, 2]),
  Spherical_nb_voxels_8m_2_5cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[1, 3]),
  Spherical_nb_voxels_9m_2_5cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[1, 4]),
  Spherical_nb_voxels_10m_2_5cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[1, 5]),

  Spherical_nb_voxels_6m_5cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[2, 1]),
  Spherical_nb_voxels_7m_5cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[2, 2]),
  Spherical_nb_voxels_8m_5cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[2, 3]),
  Spherical_nb_voxels_9m_5cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[2, 4]),
  Spherical_nb_voxels_10m_5cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[2, 5]),

  Spherical_nb_voxels_6m_10cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[3, 1]),
  Spherical_nb_voxels_7m_10cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[3, 2]),
  Spherical_nb_voxels_8m_10cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[3, 3]),
  Spherical_nb_voxels_9m_10cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[3, 4]),
  Spherical_nb_voxels_10m_10cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[3, 5]),

  Spherical_nb_voxels_6m_20cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[4, 1]),
  Spherical_nb_voxels_7m_20cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[4, 2]),
  Spherical_nb_voxels_8m_20cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[4, 3]),
  Spherical_nb_voxels_9m_20cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[4, 4]),
  Spherical_nb_voxels_10m_20cm = safe(spherical_voxel_counts[4, 5]),

  
  Growth_Voxel_5cm_res_5cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_5cm"]]$n_growth_clean),
  Growth_Voxel_5cm_res_10cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_10cm"]]$n_growth_clean),
  Growth_Voxel_5cm_res_15cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_15cm"]]$n_growth_clean),
  Growth_Voxel_10cm_res_5cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_5cm"]]$n_growth_clean),
  Growth_Voxel_10cm_res_10cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_10cm"]]$n_growth_clean),
  Growth_Voxel_10cm_res_15cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_15cm"]]$n_growth_clean),
  Loss_Voxel_5cm_res_5cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_5cm"]]$n_loss_clean),
  Loss_Voxel_5cm_res_10cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_10cm"]]$n_loss_clean),
  Loss_Voxel_5cm_res_15cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_15cm"]]$n_loss_clean),
  Loss_Voxel_10cm_res_5cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_5cm"]]$n_loss_clean),
  Loss_Voxel_10cm_res_10cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_10cm"]]$n_loss_clean),
  Loss_Voxel_10cm_res_15cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_15cm"]]$n_loss_clean),
  
  Growth_Pct_5cm_res_5cm_dist = safe((comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_5cm"]]$n_growth_clean / comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_5cm"]]$n_v0) * 100),
  Growth_Pct_5cm_res_10cm_dist = safe((comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_10cm"]]$n_growth_clean / comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_10cm"]]$n_v0) * 100),
  Growth_Pct_5cm_res_15cm_dist = safe((comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_15cm"]]$n_growth_clean / comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_15cm"]]$n_v0) * 100),
  Growth_Pct_10cm_res_5cm_dist = safe((comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_5cm"]]$n_growth_clean / comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_5cm"]]$n_v0) * 100),
  Growth_Pct_10cm_res_10cm_dist = safe((comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_10cm"]]$n_growth_clean / comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_10cm"]]$n_v0) * 100),
  Growth_Pct_10cm_res_15cm_dist = safe((comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_15cm"]]$n_growth_clean / comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_15cm"]]$n_v0) * 100),
  
  Loss_Pct_5cm_res_5cm_dist = safe((comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_5cm"]]$n_loss_clean / comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_5cm"]]$n_v1) * 100),
  Loss_Pct_5cm_res_10cm_dist = safe((comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_10cm"]]$n_loss_clean / comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_10cm"]]$n_v1) * 100),
  Loss_Pct_5cm_res_15cm_dist = safe((comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_15cm"]]$n_loss_clean / comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_15cm"]]$n_v1) * 100),
  Loss_Pct_10cm_res_5cm_dist = safe((comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_5cm"]]$n_loss_clean / comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_5cm"]]$n_v1) * 100),
  Loss_Pct_10cm_res_10cm_dist = safe((comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_10cm"]]$n_loss_clean / comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_10cm"]]$n_v1) * 100),
  Loss_Pct_10cm_res_15cm_dist = safe((comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_15cm"]]$n_loss_clean / comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_15cm"]]$n_v1) * 100),
  
  Growth_Clusters_5cm_res_5cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_5cm"]]$growth_clusters),
  Growth_Clusters_5cm_res_10cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_10cm"]]$growth_clusters),
  Growth_Clusters_5cm_res_15cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_15cm"]]$growth_clusters),
  Growth_Clusters_10cm_res_5cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_5cm"]]$growth_clusters),
  Growth_Clusters_10cm_res_10cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_10cm"]]$growth_clusters),
  Growth_Clusters_10cm_res_15cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_15cm"]]$growth_clusters),
  
  Loss_Clusters_5cm_res_5cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_5cm"]]$loss_clusters),
  Loss_Clusters_5cm_res_10cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_10cm"]]$loss_clusters),
  Loss_Clusters_5cm_res_15cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_15cm"]]$loss_clusters),
  Loss_Clusters_10cm_res_5cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_5cm"]]$loss_clusters),
  Loss_Clusters_10cm_res_10cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_10cm"]]$loss_clusters),
  Loss_Clusters_10cm_res_15cm_dist = safe(comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_15cm"]]$loss_clusters),
  
  Vox_Count_Prev_5cm = safe(comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_10cm"]]$n_v1),
  Vox_Count_Curr_5cm = safe(comp_results[["res_5cm_dist_10cm"]]$n_v0),
  Vox_Count_Prev_10cm = safe(comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_10cm"]]$n_v1),
  Vox_Count_Curr_10cm = safe(comp_results[["res_10cm_dist_10cm"]]$n_v0),
  
  total_voxels_2_5cm = safe(total_voxel_count[1]),
  total_voxels_5cm = safe(total_voxel_count[2]),
  total_voxels_10cm = safe(total_voxel_count[3]),
  total_voxels_20cm = safe(total_voxel_count[4]),
  
  Report_Link = safe(report_name),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Convert voxels to volume
res_m <- resolutions_cm / 100
voxel_volume_m3 <- res_m^3
crit_vol_for_each_res <- crit_voxels_for_each_res * voxel_volume_m3
total_vol_for_each_res <- total_voxels_for_each_res * voxel_volume_m3
names(crit_vol_for_each_res) <- paste0("Cone_Vol_", resolutions_cm)
names(total_vol_for_each_res) <- paste0("Total_Vol_", resolutions_cm)
tree_summary <- cbind(
  tree_summary,
  as.data.frame(as.list(crit_voxels_for_each_res)),    # Keeps your 13 Cone Counts
  as.data.frame(as.list(crit_vol_for_each_res)),       # ADDS your 13 Cone Volumes
  as.data.frame(as.list(total_voxels_for_each_res)),   # Keeps your 13 Total Counts
  as.data.frame(as.list(total_vol_for_each_res))       # ADDS your 13 Total Volumes
)
 
csv_file <- paste0("tree_summary_bloc", bloc_nb, ".csv")

if(file.exists(csv_file)) {
  existing_data <- read.csv(csv_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  existing_data <- existing_data[existing_data$Tree != tree_name, ]
  updated_data <- rbind(existing_data, tree_summary)
} else {
  updated_data <- tree_summary
}

write.csv(updated_data, csv_file, row.names = FALSE)
```
